issues: Code does not import or use 'sentiment' column from adapter output; adapter contract returns only 'date' and 'tweets', but code uses 'ticker' and 'sentiment' columns which are not specified in adapter contract.
Signal logic uses 'ticker' and 'sentiment' columns which are not part of the adapter's specified return columns ('date', 'tweets').

Signal logic does not parse or extract sentiment scores from 'tweets' data as per adapter contract; spec requires calculating daily sentiment score from tweets, but code assumes 'sentiment' column directly.
Indentation errors in code (e.g., missing indentation after if statements) which would cause runtime errors.
Signal logic correctly implements entry (>30% change triggers buy/sell) and exit (within ±10% or after 5 days) conditions as per spec intent.
Allocation logic correctly caps max portfolio allocation at 5% total, distributing evenly across universe on BUY signal, and no allocation on SELL/HOLD.
Signal names differ (RISK_ON/RISK_OFF/HOLD) but mapping to BUY/SELL/HOLD is acceptable per instructions.
